subject: [PATCH v2 25/28] nfsd: add the filehandle to returned attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to return a filehandle in the attributes of a CB_NOTIFY operation in NFSv4. It introduces a new function, setup_notify_fhandle(), which composes a filehandle using only a parent filehandle and an nfs4_file structure. This is necessary because in the context of a CB_NOTIFY, there is no export to consult for composing the filehandle. The patch modifies the nfsd4_setup_notify_entry4() function to call setup_notify_fhandle() and include the filehandle in the attributes if it is successfully composed.
